id.description: Unique identifier for the event, UUID v4 format.

start_date.description: Start date and time of the event, format: YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss.

end_date.description: End date and time of the event, format: YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for the event location (e.g., Europe/Zurich, America/New_York).

address_city_country.description: Primary address including street, city, postal code, and country. Critical for map display.

address_line_2.description: Additional location details such as floor or building name.

address_line_3.description: Additional location details such as room number.

name.description: Complete name of the event including the year to avoid duplication.

description.description: Main description of the event content and purpose.

language.description: Languages spoken during the event, using ISO 639-1 codes or extended codes (zh-hans, zh-hant).

website.description: URL of the event's main website.

replay_url.description: URL for the event recording or replay.

live_url.description: URL for live streaming of the event.

project_id.description: UUID of the project that organizes this event.

contributor_names.description: List of contributor names associated with this event.

available_seats.description: Number of available seats for the event.

custom_tc_disclaimer.description: Custom terms and conditions disclaimer for the event.

is_gdpr_compliance.description: Whether the event is GDPR compliant.

test_only.description: Whether this is a test event.

tags.description: List of associated tags for the event from the PlanB Network tag list.

book_online.description: Whether online booking is available for the event.

book_in_person.description: Whether in-person booking is available for the event.

price_dollars.description: Price of the event in US dollars.
